title: Published Pages
subtitle: Open, share, secure, roll back, and remove Pages published through your account relay.
loadFailed: Pages could not be loaded. Check your account connection and try again.
signInRequired: Sign in to manage your published Pages.
signInHint: Pages are stored on your account relay and are available after account sign-in.
empty: No Pages have been published yet.
emptyHint: Ask the Agent to create a Page, then review every saved version here.

confirm.visibilityMessage: /{{slug}} will change from {{current}} to {{target}}. Public Pages can be opened by anyone with the URL.
confirm.deployMessage: /{{slug}} will switch production from {{current}} to {{target}}. The previous version remains available for rollback.
confirm.unpublishTitle: Stop serving this Page in production?
confirm.unpublishMessage: /{{slug}} currently serves version {{current}}. Production will stop, while all immutable versions remain available here.
confirm.deleteVersionMessage: Version {{version}} of {{title}} will be permanently removed. Production versions cannot be deleted.
confirm.deletePageTitle: Delete this Page and all versions?
confirm.deletePageMessage: {{title}} (/{{slug}}), every saved version, and its Page Function data will be permanently removed.

notifications.temporaryLinkCopied: A one-time secure Page link was copied. Open it within 60 seconds.
notifications.copyFailed: Could not copy the Page link: {{error}}
notifications.deployed: Version {{version}} is now serving production traffic.
notifications.unpublished: Production stopped. Saved versions were kept.
notifications.pageDeleted: Page and all saved versions deleted.
